text: Basketball was invented by Dr. James Naismith in 1891 at Springfield College, Massachusetts. Original rules: 13 rules, peach baskets as goals, soccer ball used
NBA (National Basketball Association) founded 1946 as BAA. 30 teams (29 US + Toronto). Season: 82 regular-season games + playoffs (best-of-7 series). Championship: Larry O'Brien Trophy
Standard court dimensions: FIBA 28m×15m, NBA 94ft×50ft (28.65m×15.24m). 3-point line distance: FIBA 6.75m, NBA 23ft 9in (7.24m) at top of key. Rim height: 10ft (3.05m) universal
